debug_info.goal:
a b c : ℝ
h₀ : 0 < a ∧ 0 < b ∧ 0 < c
h₁ : c < a + b
h₂ : b < a + c
h₃ : a < b + c
⊢ 0 ≤ a ^ 2 * b * (a - b) + b ^ 2 * c * (b - c) + c ^ 2 * a * (c - a)

proof: nlinarith [sq_nonneg (a-b), sq_nonneg (b-c), sq_nonneg (c-a), mul_nonneg (mul_nonneg (sq_nonneg (a-b)) h₀.2.2.le) (by linarith : (0:ℝ) ≤ a+b-c), mul_nonneg (mul_nonneg (sq_nonneg (b-c)) h₀.1.le) (by linarith : (0:ℝ) ≤ b+c-a), mul_nonneg (mul_nonneg (sq_nonneg (c-a)) h₀.2.1.le) (by linarith : (0:ℝ) ≤ c+a-b), h₀.1, h₀.2.1, h₀.2.2, h₁, h₂, h₃]
successful_attempts: nlinarith [sq_nonneg (a-b), sq_nonneg (b-c), sq_nonneg (c-a), mul_nonneg (mul_nonneg (sq_nonneg (a-b)) h₀.2.2.le) (by linarith : (0:ℝ) ≤ a+b-c), mul_nonneg (mul_nonneg (sq_nonneg (b-c)) h₀.1.le) (by linarith : (0:ℝ) ≤ b+c-a), mul_nonneg (mul_nonneg (sq_nonneg (c-a)) h₀.2.1.le) (by linarith : (0:ℝ) ≤ c+a-b), h₀.1, h₀.2.1, h₀.2.2, h₁, h₂, h₃]
